name: Neurolief — Cash-Pay Interventional Psychiatry
description: Independent, physician-owned psychiatry / interventional-psychiatry practices that already offer TMS (confirming a treatment-resistant-depression patient pipeline) AND operate a demonstrable cash-pay or out-of-network service line. Proliv Rx is a new (Jan 2026 PMA) at-home neuromodulation device with no established commercial coverage, so it is effectively cash-pay. The ideal target has both the TRD population that TMS generates and the proven ability to bill patients directly without an insurer. Concierge / membership models are a bonus cash-pay-adjacent signal.
scoring_notes: TMS presence is the qualifier. Cash-pay capability is the wedge no competitor scores. Concierge/membership is the bonus. state_mandate_status does NOT apply to this cartridge (Proliv Rx is cash-pay nationwide).

signals.prompt_instruction: Does the practice website explicitly list transcranial magnetic stimulation (TMS) as a service or treatment offered on-site (e.g. NeuroStar, BrainsWay, SAINT, or generic 'TMS therapy')?
signals.note: QUALIFIER. Confirms the practice already works the TRD population and is comfortable with neuromodulation. Must-have for Bullseye tier.

signals.prompt_instruction: Does the website explicitly indicate a cash-pay, self-pay, or out-of-network capability — for example published self-pay prices, 'out-of-network', 'we provide superbills or invoices for reimbursement', or a service that is never insurance-covered such as IV ketamine?
signals.note: THE WEDGE. Proves the practice can collect directly from patients without an insurer, which is required for a non-covered device. Strict textual anchoring: present word-for-word (cash price, out-of-network statement, IV ketamine offering) or not_found. Do not infer cash-pay from soft cues.

signals.prompt_instruction: Does the website describe a concierge practice, membership, retainer, or annual/monthly subscription model for psychiatric or medical services?
signals.note: BONUS cash-pay-adjacent signal. Concierge / membership proves direct-to-patient billing muscle at the highest level. Confirmed absent carries no penalty.

signals.prompt_instruction: Does the website use treatment-resistant-depression or interventional-psychiatry language, or list esketamine/Spravato or ketamine for depression?
signals.note: Confirms the practice actively markets to the failed-medication population Proliv Rx is indicated for (adults who did not adequately respond to at least one antidepressant).

signals.prompt_instruction: Does the website indicate the practice is independently owned or physician-owned, rather than employed by or operating as part of a hospital or health system?
signals.note: Independence means direct budget authority and faster adoption.

signals.prompt_instruction: Does the practice offer more than one neuromodulation or interventional modality (for example TMS plus ketamine, plus Spravato, or ECT referral)?
signals.note: Breadth signals clinical comfort with neuromodulation, making an at-home adjunct like Proliv Rx a natural addition rather than a leap.

signals.prompt_instruction: Does the website list a physician assistant (PA) or nurse practitioner (NP) as a provider at the practice?
signals.note: The Proliv Rx prescriber form accepts MD, DO, PA, and NP. Mid-level prescribers expand prescribing capacity.

signals.prompt_instruction: Does the website indicate the practice is employed by, owned by, or operating as part of a hospital, health system, or large IDN?
signals.note: STRUCTURAL DISQUALIFIER. cap_tier: Contender hard-ceilings any confirmed hospital-employed practice regardless of other signal scores.

signals.prompt_instruction: Does the website indicate the practice bills exclusively through insurance with no self-pay, cash, or out-of-network option mentioned anywhere?
signals.note: If every service routes through insurance, a non-covered device does not fit the billing model. Penalty applies only on a confirmed 'no cash-pay' reading, not on absence of evidence.
